reviews.review_description: The multiplayer for this game doesn't even work. theres only bots, along with his game only having the zombie mode. Still kind of fun, tho.

reviews.review_title: Partopia: A Blast of Fun and Chaos in VR
reviews.review_description: Partopia is a fun and addictive VR game that lets you team up with other players for some crazy and chaotic shooting action. Whether you are throwing bombs at your enemies, trapping them in jelly, or fighting off zombies with guns, you will never get bored of the different game modes and challenges. The graphics are colorful and cartoony, the controls are intuitive and responsive, and the multiplayer is smooth and engaging. If you are looking for a casual shooter VR game that is easy to pick up and play, but hard to put down, then Partopia is the game for you.

Comment written on 20/10/2023: 
Joined during Alpha test and downloaded for free. 
Overall, very good multi-player game that you really need to have a try, cuz this game has a lot of potential. I personally can imagine this game becomes an outstanding social VR party game. But this also means this game have so many functions to update.

Game Environment 4.0/5.0
You will spawn in a small cabin that looks like your home. Many items can grab and throw, such as ps controllers or drink bottle. The cabin contains many detail, take your time to explore. But the cabin is too small for me and character selection sometimes can cause trouble. In game environment contains many interesting design. Your jelly gun can shake box cover. 
And in Bio Cube, you can destory some wood box and light bub with your gun. Scene contains many small items.

Game Art 4.5/5.0
I personally really like low-poly art game. Three game modes have different design: Creazy throw and Jelly Wars are bright scenes just like classic party game feeling relaxing. Bio Cube brings a dawn of a old farm, good feeling in a zombie shooting game.

Game Play 4.5/5.0
I like Bio Cube more than other two game modes, I almost spent all my time playing Bio Cube in Partopia. The game effect and hit feedback are very desirable. Imaging using a shotgun pump all bullets to zombie's head. In addition, the zombie infection game combines Gorilla Tag and FPS. I am so interested in how developers can optimize this game mode in the future. Cannot wait to know what's new in formal release.

Game System 3.0/5.0
The game is still under alpha test so not gonna blame a lot. The game system are very basic. Too much options haven't added yet. You cannot play with your friend or invite your friend to your cabin. The tutorial just can finish the job but literally not help too much. Sometimes you need to exlpore hidden feature by your self(eg.You can knock off the clip with AK when you hold a new clip). I like the UI design that you use it li

developer_response.body: Hi Vincent, thanks for your review! Your feedbacks have been received and we will optimize them in the future update. Appreciate for your contribution to Partopia!

reviews.review_description: when you try and join the multiplayer it’s just full of bots and the game is dead. Could have been better if the zombies didn’t have so much health and you can’t kill them. The guns are good though and the game has potential but  it’s just bad.
Mindless interaction in JELLY WAR and CREAZY THROW. From my personal thinking BIO CUBE is good but it's not as ez as other two game mode. Party game doesn't need such a hardcore gun reload.

This game's low-poly art is intriguing. Killing zombies and infecting humans is a great twist. However, it loses one star due to the lack of variety in maps and objectives. It's enjoyable but could use more content. W
